# flashblade_subnet (Data Source)

Reads an existing FlashBlade subnet by name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "flashblade_subnet" "example" {
  name = "existing-subnet"
}

output "subnet_enabled" {
  value = data.flashblade_subnet.example.enabled
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the subnet to look up.

### Read-Only

- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the subnet is enabled.
- `gateway` (String) IPv4 or IPv6 gateway address for the subnet.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the subnet.
- `interfaces` (List of String) List of network interface names attached to this subnet.
- `lag_name` (String) Name of the link aggregation group (LAG) this subnet is attached to.
- `mtu` (Number) Maximum transmission unit (MTU) in bytes.
- `prefix` (String) IPv4 or IPv6 subnet address in CIDR notation.
- `services` (List of String) List of services associated with this subnet.
- `vlan` (Number) VLAN ID. 0 means untagged.
